title: Koi Sath Hai
overview: Koi Sath Hai is the story of four friends played by Neet Mahal, Rajesh Dubeay, Priya Tiwari and Asma Sayad who visit an isolated bungalow and plan to call spirits. Things change when their plan becomes dangerous and a police officer comes to their rescue.
